title: IRGC retaliates: targets US airbase at 4:50 AM after CENTCOM strikes near Bandar Abbas — 'serious warning', further aggression to meet 'decisive' response
snippet: Following CENTCOM airstrikes near Bandar Abbas airport, the IRGC launched a retaliatory strike targeting the originating US airbase at 4:50 AM local time. The IRGC described the strike as a 'serious warning,' adding that any further US aggression would be met with a 'more decisive' response. The exchange marks the most direct US-IRGC military confrontation since the initial outbreak of the conflict, with both sides striking each other's military assets. Iran's state media framed the strike as a proportionate defensive response.
tag_reason: New direct IRGC-CENTCOM exchange — IRGC strikes US airbase in retaliation; escalates beyond warning shots to direct military exchange

entities.name: IRGC Retaliatory Strike on US Airbase (May 28, 4:50 AM)
